subtasks.what_to_do: Show red paper and clap your hands. Show blue paper and jump.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold up red paper. Child claps. Hold up blue paper. Child jumps. Repeat 3 times.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw a red dot, then a blue dot, then a red dot on paper.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to each dot. Child claps for red, jumps for blue. Smile when correct.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw a code on a sticky note: red, red, blue, red, blue. Give to child.
subtasks.how_they_help: Stand back. If child makes mistake, point to the dot again. Clap when finished.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw a tower pattern: red block, blue block, red block.
subtasks.how_they_help: Give 6 blocks (3 red, 3 blue). Child copies the tower. Compare drawing to tower.

subtasks.what_to_do: Assign clap = A, jump = B. Write 'A B A' on paper.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child performs clap, jump, clap. Then child tries their initial (if A or B only).

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw 3 strips: red, blue, red. Say 'The cat sat' is this code.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to each strip. Child writes or signs a 3-word story back (any words).

subtasks.what_to_do: Hide a coin under a cushion. Write 'red = go to sofa, blue = look under cushion'.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hand the code paper. Walk behind silently. Celebrate when found.

subtasks.what_to_do: Give green paper. Ask child to invent a new symbol for Dad.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws symbol. You nod and use it next time.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child writes a 4-step code for you.
subtasks.how_they_help: You perform wrong action on purpose. Child corrects by pointing. Then you do correctly. Clap.

subtasks.what_to_do: Line up 5 cups with red or blue dots. Give red and blue buttons.
subtasks.how_they_help: Start timer. Child sorts buttons into matching cups. Record time. Repeat to beat score.

subtasks.what_to_do: Place a toy on white paper near a sunny window.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold paper steady. Child traces shadow with pencil. You demonstrate first.

subtasks.what_to_do: Give child a flashlight. Face a blank wall.
subtasks.how_they_help: You make a dog shadow. Child tries. Then rabbit. Then bird. Applaud each.

subtasks.what_to_do: Put a toy 10 cm from wall. Flashlight 20 cm from toy.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child moves flashlight closer → shadow grows. Moves away → shrinks. Ask 'Big or small?' Child points.

subtasks.what_to_do: Roll a ball slowly across the floor near a wall with light.
subtasks.how_they_help: You draw shadow at start. Child draws middle. You draw end. Compare.

subtasks.what_to_do: Tape a small mirror to a book. Place toy near wall. Shine flashlight on mirror.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child angles mirror to reflect light onto wall. Then moves mirror to move toy's shadow. Clap.

subtasks.what_to_do: Stick a pencil upright in clay. Place on sunny windowsill.
subtasks.how_they_help: At 9 AM, child marks shadow tip. At 10 AM, another mark. At 11 AM, another.

subtasks.what_to_do: Cut a tree shape from cardboard. Tape to a straw.
subtasks.how_they_help: Set up flashlight behind a white sheet. Child moves puppet for a short silent story.

subtasks.what_to_do: Place three toys: tall bottle, flat book, small ball.
subtasks.how_they_help: Ask 'Which shadow longest?' Child guesses. Test each with same light. Compare.

subtasks.what_to_do: Wrap red plastic over flashlight. Then try blue plastic.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each family member puts hand in colored shadow. Child names the color.

subtasks.what_to_do: Put the same cup on the same windowsill all day.
subtasks.how_they_help: At 9 AM, child draws shadow. At 12 PM, different color. At 3 PM, third color. Compare.

subtasks.what_to_do: Put 2 spoons of baking soda in a clear cup.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child pours ½ cup vinegar slowly. Watch bubbles. You point. Child touches bubbles.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fill a cup half with water. Add 2 spoons of oil. Add 3 drops of food color.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child shakes gently. Watch layers separate. You point to line. Child draws.

subtasks.what_to_do: Set out 4 bowls: flour, salt, sugar, baking soda.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child adds 1 spoon of vinegar to each. Only baking soda fizzes. You point. Child circles it.

subtasks.what_to_do: In a tall glass, pour honey, then dish soap, then water, then oil slowly.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child watches layers. You point to each. Child draws with colors.

subtasks.what_to_do: Mix 3 spoons of salt into warm water. Hang a string on a pencil into the water.
subtasks.how_they_help: Place on windowsill. For 2 days, child checks. Day 3, child sees crystals. You point.

subtasks.what_to_do: Freeze a small toy in an ice cube overnight.
subtasks.how_they_help: Put ice cube in hot water and another in cold water. Child points to which melts first.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child dips cotton swab in lemon juice. Writes a word on paper.
subtasks.how_they_help: Let dry 10 minutes. Hold near a light bulb. Brown writing appears. You read it.

subtasks.what_to_do: In a plastic bottle, add baking soda, vinegar, and 2 drops of dish soap.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child watches foam eruption. You point. Child claps.

subtasks.what_to_do: Take two cups: hot water and cold water. Put one sugar cube in each.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child drops both at same time. Watches which dissolves first. You start timer. Child points.

subtasks.what_to_do: Give blank paper and crayons.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws four boxes: volcano, oil+water, fizz test, crystals. Draws arrows showing change. You label if asked.

subtasks.what_to_do: Print 5 family photos: wake up, breakfast, play, dinner, sleep.
subtasks.how_they_help: Mix photos. Child arranges in order. You nod or shake head. Child corrects.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fold paper into 6 panels. Say 'Draw your morning'.
subtasks.how_they_help: You draw panel 1 (brush teeth). Child draws panels 2 to 6.

subtasks.what_to_do: Write on cards: HAPPY, SAD, ANGRY, SCARED.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold up HAPPY. Child smiles. SAD → frowns. ANGRY → stomps. SCARED → hugs self. Applaud.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child acts a short story (e.g., 'I lost my shoe and found it').
subtasks.how_they_help: Record 30 seconds on phone. Child watches. Child adds paper title cards. You play back.

subtasks.what_to_do: Ask 'Favorite movie scene? Act 10 seconds.'
subtasks.how_they_help: Child acts silently. You guess the movie. If wrong, child repeats with bigger gesture.

subtasks.what_to_do: Stack 4 sticky notes. Top: happy face. Second: sad. Third: angry. Fourth: surprised.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child flips fast. Faces move. You say 'Show me surprised' – child finds that note.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child writes a letter using only drawings.
subtasks.how_they_help: You provide paper. Child draws sun (good day), rain (sad), heart (love), food (ate well). You pretend to mail.

subtasks.what_to_do: Place 10 objects on table: spoon, shoe, cup, book, key, sock, ball, comb, pencil, apple.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child picks 5 and tells story by moving objects. You watch and nod.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child retells same story using only body movements (no objects).
subtasks.how_they_help: You pretend to be other character. Child gestures 'spoon walks.' You gesture 'cup pours.'

subtasks.what_to_do: Child invents 'The Quiet Monster'.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws monster. Then acts how it walks, eats, sleeps, is happy. You copy actions back.

subtasks.what_to_do: Place a phone playing music on a table. Child puts hand on table near phone.
subtasks.how_they_help: Turn volume high. Child feels vibration. Then turn off. Child feels nothing. Compare.

subtasks.what_to_do: Stretch plastic wrap over a bowl. Sprinkle rice on top.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child taps bowl from below. Rice jumps. You point to jumping rice.

subtasks.what_to_do: Stretch rubber bands over a shoebox.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child plucks. Sees band vibrate. You draw a wavy line to show 'vibration'.

subtasks.what_to_do: Make two paper cups with string through bottom. Tie knot inside each cup.
subtasks.how_they_help: You pull string tight. Child feels cup vibrate when you pluck string. No sound needed.

subtasks.what_to_do: Tap the table in a pattern: tap, tap, pause, tap.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child watches your hand. Copies pattern. You nod. Increase length.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fill 3 glasses with different water levels. Child taps each with a spoon.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child sees water move. You point to high vs low water.

subtasks.what_to_do: Blow up a balloon. Hold near child's cheek.
subtasks.how_they_help: You hum (child cannot hear) but child feels balloon vibrate on cheek. Child smiles.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child collects 3 items: spoon, metal pan, plastic bowl.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child taps each and feels vibration. Records video showing item and child's hand feeling it. No sound.

subtasks.what_to_do: Tap a metal spoon and a plastic spoon on the table.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child feels both. Points to which vibrates longer (metal). You write 'metal = more vibration'.

subtasks.what_to_do: Place phone playing bass-heavy music on floor. Child stands barefoot.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child feels floor vibration. Invents a dance move for each strong beat. You copy.

subtasks.what_to_do: Place two books 10 cm apart. Give one sheet of paper.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child lays paper flat. Place 5 coins → collapses. Child folds paper like an accordion → holds coins. You point to fold pattern.

subtasks.what_to_do: Give 5 sheets of paper and tape.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child rolls paper into tubes. Stacks. Measures with ruler. You help measure but not build.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fold paper into a long U-shape. Tape to wall at a slope.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child drops a marble at the top. Watches it roll. Adjusts slope for speed.

subtasks.what_to_do: Show child a simple origami box diagram.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child folds. No tape. You try to open. If it opens, child refolds tighter.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fold paper back and forth like a fan.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child waves fan near a hanging string. String moves. Child sees air movement.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fold a long strip of paper back and forth into a spring.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child presses top. Spring bounces back. You compare to a metal spring.

subtasks.what_to_do: Give paper and tape. Say 'Make a chair for a small toy'.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child builds. Toy sits. If collapses, child adds folded supports. You observe.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child folds a paper boat. Fill sink or bowl with water.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child places boat. Timed. If sinks before 30 seconds, child changes design (wider base).

subtasks.what_to_do: Fold paper into a V shape. Tape to a pencil. Place cotton ball in V.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child presses back of V and releases. Measures distance with footsteps.

subtasks.what_to_do: After tower or bridge collapses, child draws a better design.
subtasks.how_they_help: You ask 'What broke?' Child points. Draws thicker columns or shorter span. You nod.

subtasks.what_to_do: Mix 10 socks (5 pairs). Blindfold child.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child feels socks and pairs by touch. You check. Clap for each correct pair.

subtasks.what_to_do: Place 5 objects (key, coin, button, spoon, eraser) on a tray. Cover after 10 seconds.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws all 5 from memory. You compare. Score 1 point per correct.

subtasks.what_to_do: Arrange 6 objects on a table. Child looks for 30 seconds. Child closes eyes. You move 1 item.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child opens eyes and points to moved item. Repeat with 2 items.

subtasks.what_to_do: Take 7 photos of making tea (fill kettle, boil, pour, etc.). Mix them.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child arranges in order. You nod or shake head. Child corrects.

subtasks.what_to_do: Place 12 small items on a tray. Child looks for 1 minute. Child closes eyes. You remove 1 item.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child opens eyes and points to missing item. Harder with 2 removed.

subtasks.what_to_do: You touch your head. Child copies. You touch the floor. Child copies.
subtasks.how_they_help: Increase speed. Add 3-step sequence. Child watches and repeats.

subtasks.what_to_do: Give 5 containers with lids off. Mix the lids.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child matches each lid to its container by size. You check fit.

subtasks.what_to_do: Perform gestures: clap, wave, point, nod, stomp, spin.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child performs back. If forget, you repeat once. Then child tries.

subtasks.what_to_do: Put 5 objects in a cloth bag (key, marble, coin, button, bead).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child reaches in without looking. Names by touch. You write name. Open bag to check.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child invents a memory game (e.g., hide 3 toys, parent finds).
subtasks.how_they_help: You play by child's rules. Child gives thumbs up or down. You follow exactly.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws or cuts out pictures of water, food, toilet, sleep, and play.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold each picture up and nod when child shows it to you.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child holds up 'water' picture. You bring water.
subtasks.how_they_help: Do not say anything; just wait and watch.

subtasks.what_to_do: Show child two pictures, like 'play' and 'sleep'. Let them point to one.
subtasks.how_they_help: Do whatever activity child pointed to right away.

subtasks.what_to_do: Offer child a food they do not like. Child holds up 'no' picture.
subtasks.how_they_help: Take the food away gently and nod to show you understand.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child puts 'want' picture and 'water' picture together.
subtasks.how_they_help: Clap your hands and then give them water.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child holds 'hurt' picture and points to their finger.
subtasks.how_they_help: Look at finger, put on a bandage if needed, give a thumbs up.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child holds 'sad' picture after dropping a toy.
subtasks.how_they_help: Give a hug and help pick up the toy together.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child tries to open a jar, fails, holds up 'help' picture.
subtasks.how_they_help: Open the jar and give a big thumbs up.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child shows 'play' picture to sibling. Sibling starts a game.
subtasks.how_they_help: Sibling obeys the picture without talking.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws a new picture (e.g., 'outside') and shows you.
subtasks.how_they_help: Learn the new picture and use it next time.

subtasks.what_to_do: Show a red toy and a blue toy. Child points to red.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold up red; child points. Hold up blue; child points.

subtasks.what_to_do: Give child 3 red blocks and 3 blue blocks. Ask them to put all red blocks in a bowl.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to red block; child copies.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw a red circle and a blue square. Child colors the circle red.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to red crayon; child colors.

subtasks.what_to_do: Hide 3 red buttons around the room. Child finds them.
subtasks.how_they_help: Show one red button first; child looks for others.

subtasks.what_to_do: Give child a pile of mixed red and blue socks. Child separates into two piles.
subtasks.how_they_help: You sort one sock; child continues.

subtasks.what_to_do: Write or sign 'Touch something red'. Child touches a red object.
subtasks.how_they_help: Look around together; child points.

subtasks.what_to_do: Put 5 red and 5 blue beads on a string in a pattern: red, blue, red, blue.
subtasks.how_they_help: Show first 3 beads; child finishes.

subtasks.what_to_do: Ask child to bring you the red cup (not the blue one).
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to both cups; child picks red.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw a red fish and a blue fish. Child colors the water blue.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to blue crayon; child colors.

subtasks.what_to_do: Play 'I spy' – you sign 'I see something red'. Child points to it.
subtasks.how_they_help: Look around; nod when child points correctly.

subtasks.what_to_do: Put a spoon on white paper near a sunny window. Child traces the shadow.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold paper; trace one line as example.

subtasks.what_to_do: Move the spoon 10 cm away. Child traces new shadow.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to old shadow and new shadow; child sees difference.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use a flashlight in a dark room. Make a hand shadow on the wall.
subtasks.how_they_help: You make a dog; child tries to copy.

subtasks.what_to_do: Put a toy between flashlight and wall. Child moves toy closer to light.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to bigger shadow; child moves toy back and forth.

subtasks.what_to_do: Trace child's own hand shadow on paper.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold flashlight; child traces their hand.

subtasks.what_to_do: Cut a circle from cardboard. Tape to a stick. Make shadow on wall.
subtasks.how_they_help: You hold stick; child watches shadow.

subtasks.what_to_do: Guess which object makes a round shadow (ball, book, spoon).
subtasks.how_they_help: Test each; child points to ball.

subtasks.what_to_do: Put a toy near window at 9 AM. Trace shadow. Trace again at 12 PM.
subtasks.how_they_help: Use different colors; child compares.

subtasks.what_to_do: Shine flashlight through a strainer. See dot shadows on wall.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child counts dots with finger.

subtasks.what_to_do: Make a shadow puppet show with 2 puppets for 30 seconds.
subtasks.how_they_help: You hold one puppet; child holds one. No words.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw 4 faces: happy, sad, angry, scared.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to happy; child smiles. Point to sad; child frowns.

subtasks.what_to_do: You make a happy face. Child points to the happy drawing.
subtasks.how_they_help: Repeat for sad, angry, scared.

subtasks.what_to_do: Cut out faces from magazines. Child sorts into happy/sad piles.
subtasks.how_they_help: You hold each face; child points to pile.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child looks at a family photo. Points to who looks happy.
subtasks.how_they_help: You point to each person; child nods or shakes head.

subtasks.what_to_do: You pretend to cry (no sound). Child hands you the 'sad' card.
subtasks.how_they_help: Nod; give child a hug.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws how they feel today.
subtasks.how_they_help: Give paper; do not guess. Let them show you.

subtasks.what_to_do: Watch a short silent video (TV on mute). Child points to how the character feels.
subtasks.how_they_help: Pause video; child points to face card.

subtasks.what_to_do: Sibling acts tired. Child points to 'tired' card.
subtasks.how_they_help: Sibling repeats action; child matches.

subtasks.what_to_do: Make a feelings poster for the fridge. Child draws 4 faces.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hang it; each morning child points to how they feel.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child teaches a stuffed toy the feelings by pointing to the poster.
subtasks.how_they_help: Watch; clap when toy 'learns'.

subtasks.what_to_do: Give a square paper. Show how to fold corner to corner to make a triangle.
subtasks.how_they_help: You fold one; child copies.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fold the triangle in half to make a smaller triangle.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to the fold line; child presses.

subtasks.what_to_do: Make a paper airplane from 3 simple folds (show pictures).
subtasks.how_they_help: You do step 1; child copies. Step 2; child copies.

subtasks.what_to_do: Throw the paper airplane. Child measures how far (footsteps).
subtasks.how_they_help: Walk beside; child counts steps.

subtasks.what_to_do: Make a paper hat (fold paper in half, then fold corners down).
subtasks.how_they_help: Show each fold; child wears hat.

subtasks.what_to_do: Make a simple boat. Float it in a sink.
subtasks.how_they_help: Fill sink; child places boat.

subtasks.what_to_do: Make a paper cup. Try to put 1 spoon of water in it.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child pours; claps if no leak.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw the 3 steps of making a paper airplane.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws; you number the steps.

subtasks.what_to_do: Decorate the paper airplane with stickers.
subtasks.how_they_help: Give stickers; child places.

subtasks.what_to_do: Make 3 different paper airplanes. Race them with sibling.
subtasks.how_they_help: Throw together; child points to winner.

subtasks.what_to_do: Give child 10 large beads (2 colors). String them: red, blue, red, blue.
subtasks.how_they_help: Show first 3 beads; child continues.

subtasks.what_to_do: Make a bracelet with pattern: red, red, blue, red, red, blue.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to pattern; child repeats.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child wears the bracelet. You point to a bead; child claps for red, jumps for blue.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point slowly; child does action.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child makes a bracelet for a sibling using the same pattern.
subtasks.how_they_help: Sibling wears it; both smile.

subtasks.what_to_do: Mix up the beads. Child sorts them back into colors.
subtasks.how_they_help: You sort one; child does rest.

subtasks.what_to_do: Make a pattern with 3 colors: red, blue, green, red, blue, green.
subtasks.how_they_help: Show first 3; child finishes.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child closes eyes. Feel a bead. Guess the color.
subtasks.how_they_help: Put bead in hand; child guesses by pointing.

subtasks.what_to_do: Count how many red beads are on the bracelet.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to each red; child counts.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child makes a mistake in the pattern. You point. They fix it.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to wrong bead; child replaces.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child teaches a grandparent how to make the bracelet via video.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold camera; child shows beads.

subtasks.what_to_do: Give child a small pitcher and a cup. Show how to pour water.
subtasks.how_they_help: You pour once; child copies.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child pours water from cup to cup over a tray (in case of spills).
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to tray; child pours.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child pours water into a bottle with a narrow opening.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold bottle steady; child aims.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child pours water from a full pitcher to a cup until the cup is half full.
subtasks.how_they_help: Mark the half line with tape; child stops at tape.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child pours water into 3 cups so each has the same amount.
subtasks.how_they_help: Check together; child adjusts.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child waters a houseplant using a small watering can.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to soil; child pours slowly.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child fills a water bottle for school by themselves.
subtasks.how_they_help: Show fill line; child does.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child pours milk into their cereal bowl (small amount).
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold jug; child pours.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child wipes up a small spill with a towel.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hand towel; child wipes.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws a 'pour safely' picture (cup, pitcher, towel).
subtasks.how_they_help: Hang near sink; child points before pouring.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw or cut out 5 pictures: wake up, eat breakfast, brush teeth, play, sleep.
subtasks.how_they_help: Give old magazines or blank paper. Let child choose.

subtasks.what_to_do: Put the pictures on the wall in order from morning to night.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to sun for morning and moon for night. Let child arrange.

subtasks.what_to_do: Ask child to draw a small clock or write a number next to each picture.
subtasks.how_they_help: Show your watch. Help write the number if needed.

subtasks.what_to_do: Hang the schedule on the fridge. Each morning, child points to first picture and does it.
subtasks.how_they_help: When they finish one task, they put a sticker next to it. You clap.

subtasks.what_to_do: One day, change the order of two pictures. Ask child to fix it.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to wrong order. Let them move the pictures.

subtasks.what_to_do: Ask child to add a new picture, like 'water plants' or 'feed the pet'.
subtasks.how_they_help: Give a blank card. They draw. You nod.

subtasks.what_to_do: When something special happens, ask child to draw a temporary picture and add it.
subtasks.how_they_help: Show a calendar. They tape new picture on top for that day.

subtasks.what_to_do: At the end of the day, child moves all pictures to a 'done' envelope.
subtasks.how_they_help: You hold envelope. They drop each picture in one by one.

subtasks.what_to_do: Ask child to teach a younger sibling or stuffed toy how to use the schedule.
subtasks.how_they_help: Watch silently. Child points to each picture and shows the toy what to do.

subtasks.what_to_do: Let child make a weekly schedule with different pictures for different days.
subtasks.how_they_help: Give 7 papers. They draw or tape pictures. You hang them in a row.

subtasks.what_to_do: Give child a pile of clean socks (red, blue, white). Child sorts by color.
subtasks.how_they_help: You sort one sock; child continues.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child puts all red socks in one bowl, blue in another, white in another.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to each bowl; child places.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child matches red socks into pairs.
subtasks.how_they_help: Show one pair; child does the rest.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child counts how many red socks by pointing to each.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to each red sock; child counts on fingers.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child closes eyes. You put a red sock in their hand. They guess color by pointing to red picture.
subtasks.how_they_help: Show color card; child points.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child hangs all blue socks on a low clothesline with clothespins.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold line; child clips.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child puts white socks in a drawer. You point to drawer; child places.
subtasks.how_they_help: Open drawer; child drops.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws a picture of red socks and blue socks.
subtasks.how_they_help: Give red and blue crayons; child draws.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child teaches a sibling the color sorting game.
subtasks.how_they_help: Watch; clap when sibling learns.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child puts all socks back in the laundry basket when done.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to basket; child drops.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw shadows of 3 objects on paper: cup, spoon, book.
subtasks.how_they_help: Show real objects; child points.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child places the real cup on its shadow drawing.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold cup; child places.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child matches the spoon to its shadow.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to shadow; child places spoon.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child matches the book to its shadow.
subtasks.how_they_help: Let child try alone; nod when correct.

subtasks.what_to_do: Mix up the objects. Child sorts them onto the correct shadows.
subtasks.how_they_help: Time with phone; child races.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child traces a new object (like a toy car) on paper to make its shadow.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold toy; child traces.

subtasks.what_to_do: Cut out the shadow drawings. Child matches them to real objects around the room.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold shadow; child finds object.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child closes eyes. You put a shadow picture in their hand. They open eyes and find the real object.
subtasks.how_they_help: Show shadow; child looks around.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws a shadow of their own hand.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold flashlight; child traces.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child gives the shadow pictures to a sibling to match.
subtasks.how_they_help: Watch; child gives thumbs up or down.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fill a bowl with water. Give child a rock. They drop it. It sinks.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to bottom; child nods.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child drops a cork. It floats. Points to top of water.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to floating; child nods.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child guesses (points to sink or float picture) before dropping each object.
subtasks.how_they_help: Show two pictures; child points.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child drops a coin. Sinks. Points to sink picture.
subtasks.how_they_help: After drop; child points.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child drops a plastic spoon. Floats. Points to float picture.
subtasks.how_they_help: After drop; child points.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child drops an apple. Floats. Points to float.
subtasks.how_they_help: Show apple; child guesses first.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child drops a penny. Sinks. Points to sink.
subtasks.how_they_help: Compare penny to cork; child points.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child pushes a floating toy under water. Lets go. It pops up.
subtasks.how_they_help: Push down; child watches.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws two pictures: one of things that sink, one of things that float.
subtasks.how_they_help: Draw line down middle; child sorts drawings.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child pours the water into a plant when done.
subtasks.how_they_help: Carry bowl together; child pours.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw 4 faces: happy, sad, angry, scared.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to happy; child smiles. Point to sad; child frowns.

subtasks.what_to_do: You make a happy face. Child points to the happy drawing.
subtasks.how_they_help: Repeat for sad, angry, scared.

subtasks.what_to_do: Cut out faces from magazines. Child sorts into happy/sad piles.
subtasks.how_they_help: You hold each face; child points to pile.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child looks at a family photo. Points to who looks happy.
subtasks.how_they_help: You point to each person; child nods or shakes head.

subtasks.what_to_do: You pretend to cry (no sound). Child hands you the 'sad' card.
subtasks.how_they_help: Nod; give child a hug.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws how they feel today.
subtasks.how_they_help: Give paper; do not guess. Let them show you.

subtasks.what_to_do: Watch a short silent video (TV on mute). Child points to how the character feels.
subtasks.how_they_help: Pause video; child points to face card.

subtasks.what_to_do: Sibling acts tired. Child points to 'tired' card.
subtasks.how_they_help: Sibling repeats action; child matches.

subtasks.what_to_do: Make a feelings poster for the fridge. Child draws 4 faces.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hang it; each morning child points to how they feel.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child teaches a stuffed toy the feelings by pointing to the poster.
subtasks.how_they_help: Watch; clap when toy 'learns'.

subtasks.what_to_do: Put a drop of watered-down paint on paper. Child blows through a straw to spread it.
subtasks.how_they_help: Show once; child blows.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use 2 colors. Child blows them together to mix.
subtasks.how_they_help: Add drops; child blows.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child blows the paint toward a specific spot (like a drawn circle).
subtasks.how_they_help: Draw target; child aims.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child drops water on the paint. Blows again. Sees new shapes.
subtasks.how_they_help: Add water; child blows.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child uses the straw to blow a small feather across the table.
subtasks.how_they_help: Place feather; child blows.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child blows a cotton ball into a cup from 10 cm away.
subtasks.how_they_help: Show cup; child aims.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child puts the straw in a cup of water. Blows gently. Sees bubbles.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold cup; child blows.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child blows on their wet finger. Feels cool air. Points to finger.
subtasks.how_they_help: Wet finger; child blows.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws what their blow painting looks like (a monster, a flower).
subtasks.how_they_help: Look at painting; child draws.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child teaches a sibling how to do blow painting by demonstrating.
subtasks.how_they_help: Watch; clap for both.

subtasks.what_to_do: Put a sock on child's hand. Draw eyes with a marker.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold sock; child draws.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child makes the puppet nod yes and shake no.
subtasks.how_they_help: You ask a question (point); puppet answers.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child makes the puppet wave hello to you.
subtasks.how_they_help: Wave back; child copies.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child makes the puppet act happy (jump up and down).
subtasks.how_they_help: Show happy face; puppet jumps.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child makes the puppet act sad (droop down).
subtasks.how_they_help: Show sad face; puppet droops.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child hides behind a chair. Puppet moves its mouth (no sound). You guess what puppet wants.
subtasks.how_they_help: Guess wrong; child makes puppet shake head.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child makes the puppet give a sibling a high five.
subtasks.how_they_help: Sibling holds up hand; puppet slaps.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child makes two puppets (one on each hand). They hug each other.
subtasks.how_they_help: Show hug; child copies.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child acts out a short story (puppet eats, sleeps, plays). Family watches.
subtasks.how_they_help: Sit quietly; clap at the end.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child puts the puppet away in a special box when done.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to box; child places.
